title: This Ex-Quant Had to Quit Wall Street to Build a 24/7 Stock Exchange | QFEX, Annanay Kapila
summary: Annanay Kapila, a former quantitative trader who managed $10 billion daily in trading strategies, left Wall Street to build QFEX, a 24/7 global stock exchange. He argues that high-frequency trading extracts value through market structural flaws rather than creating value, and criticizes how high finance compensation traps talented mathematicians in unfulfilling work.
